exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.note: Warm-up exercises. Do them slow and methodical. Get the "cracks" out.

exercises.name: Air Squats
exercises.note: Warm-up exercises. Do them slow and methodical. Get the "cracks" out.

exercises.name: Back Squats
exercises.note: Add weight until you cannot pass 8x reps without failure.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Add weight until you cannot pass 8x reps without failure.

exercises.name: Leg Curls
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Leg Extensions
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Hex Bar Deadlift
exercises.note: 3x REP MAX (max ability to lift up to 3x times)

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.note: Do not sacrifice form for weight. Get a good stretch here.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.note: Toes standing on pad or a plate. Drop the heels low.

exercises.name: Push Ups
exercises.note: Warm-up exercises. Do them slow and methodical. Get the "cracks" out.

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.note: Warm-up exercises. Do them slow and methodical. Get the "cracks" out.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.note: Add weight until you cannot pass 8x reps without failure.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.note: Add weight until you cannot pass 8x reps without failure.

exercises.name: Straight Bar Cable Tricep Pushdown
exercises.note: 3x REP MAX (max ability to lift up to 3x times)

exercises.name: Close Grip Barbell Bench Press
exercises.note: Grip bar with hands approximate 12" apart.

exercises.name: Bench Dips
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Decline Push Up
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Pull Ups
exercises.note: Warm-up exercise. No kipping, full extension.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlifts
exercises.note: PROPER FORM! Do not risk injury. Focus on form over weight, you will build strength don’t worry.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldowns
exercises.note: Keep thumbs over bar (monkey grip). This will force you to focus on lat engagement to perform the pull.

exercises.name: Leverage Iso Row
exercises.note: Heavy, but still maintain smooth contraction and motion. Don't jerk the weight.

exercises.name: Machine Preacher Curls
exercises.note: Do not lean into the machine, focus on utilizing biceps only to curl.

exercises.name: Chin Ups
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Alternating Dumbbell Curls
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Quick Warm Up / Stretch
exercises.note: Dynamic stretching. Ankling, butt-kicks, lunges, etc.

exercises.name: Slow Jog
exercises.note: Keep it around a 9 min mile.

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Raises
exercises.note: 1st set: 10 rep max; 2nd and 3rd set: 8 rep max; 4th set: 6 rep max

exercises.name: Front Dumbbell Raises
exercises.note: 1st set: 10 rep max; 2nd and 3rd set: 8 rep max; 4th set: 6 rep max

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Do not lift past head. Tilt the front portion of the dumbbell inward on flex, like you are pouring.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.note: Seated or standing.

exercises.name: Seated Bent-Over Flys
exercises.note: Do not sacrifice form for weight. Focus on muscle contraction. Go slow.

exercises.name: Reverse Machine Flys
exercises.note: Do not sacrifice form for weight. Focus on muscle contraction. Go slow.

exercises.name: Barbell Shrugs
exercises.note: Hold for 1 sec each rep. Use smith machine if needed.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrugs
exercises.note: Fully contract, hold for 1 sec each rep

exercises.name: Pull Ups
exercises.note: No kipping.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curls
exercises.note: Hold for 1 sec at contraction.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curls
exercises.note: Drop weights all the way down to starting position every rep. Do not rush this.

exercises.name: Concentration Curls
exercises.note: Seated. Constant fully, squeezing for 2 secs each rep.

exercises.name: Cable Curls with Straight Bar
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Hammer or Close Grip Pull Ups
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: V Bar Cable Tricep Pushdown
exercises.note: Start with elbows at 90 degrees

exercises.name: Iso Dip Machine
exercises.note: Go heavy, but do not lean into the exercise. Focus on use of triceps.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Skullcrushers
exercises.note: Keep elbows at a 90 degree angle.

exercises.name: Straight Bar Reverse Grip Tricep Pushdown
exercises.note: Palms up. Fully contract.

exercises.name: Rope Triceps Pulldown
exercises.note: Use this as a "burn-out."

exercises.note: SUPERSET. Set the cable pully so that you perform a mid-range crossover.

exercises.name: Leverage Incline Chest Press
exercises.note: Full extension, slight bend in the elbow at contraction

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.note: Add weight until you cannot pass 8x reps without failure.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.note: Add weight until you cannot pass 8x reps without failure.

exercises.name: Machine Butterfly
exercises.note: Squeeze for 2 secs every rep.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises. Reach failure for each exercise, each set.

exercises.name: Leg Extensions
exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises. Reach failure for each exercise, each set.

exercises.name: Walking Dumbbell Lunges
exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises. Reach failure for each exercise, each set.

exercises.note: Attempt the crossed-arm technique to hold the bar.

exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts

exercises.name: Side Lateral Raise
exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises.

exercises.name: Front Cable Raise
exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Military Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Keep dumbbells at 45 degrees and push straight up. Do not bang weights at lift, keep them apart.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Rear Delt Raise
exercises.note: Bent over 90 degrees at the waist. Lateral lift up. Keep light to ensure proper form.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrugs
exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises.

exercises.name: Rope Face Pull
exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises.

exercises.note: Hold for 1 sec each rep.

exercises.note: SUPERSET. Do not rest between exercises.

exercises.name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.note: Pull the weight far back, squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldowns
exercises.note: Heavy, but still maintain smooth contraction and motion. Don't jerk the bar, don’t lean back to pull.

exercises.name: Straight Arm Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.note: Your head should be just of the bench, which the wide portion of you back resting on the bench.

exercises.name: Pull Ups
exercises.note: No kipping.

exercises.note: Diamond Push Up - Hold for 1 sec at contraction. Superset.

exercises.note: Diamond Push Up - Hold for 1 sec at contraction. Superset.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hammer Skullcrushers
exercises.note: Keep each dumbbell balanced. If you are uncontrollably shaking, go down in weight

exercises.note: Superset

exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Front Squats
exercises.note: Attempt the crossed-arm technique to hold the bar

exercises.name: Leg Curls
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Leg Extensions
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.note: Do not sacrifice form for weight

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step Ups
exercises.note: Each leg. Step up to something that is past knee-level.

exercises.name: Seated Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.note: Keep back straight, slight bend at the waist so as to avoid injury. 5 rep MAX OUT.

exercises.name: Standing Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.note: Keep back straight, slight bend at the waist so as to avoid injury. 5 rep MAX OUT.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.note: Rotate 180 degrees during lift. Do not bang weights at lift, keep them apart.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Rear Delt Raise
exercises.note: Bent over 90 degrees at the waist. Lateral lift up. Keep light to ensure proper form.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrugs
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Rope Face Pull
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Barbell Shrugs
exercises.note: Hold for 1 sec each rep.

exercises.name: Quick Warm Up / Stretch
exercises.note: Dynamic stretching. Ankling, butt-kicks, lunges, etc.

exercises.name: Slow Jog
exercises.note: Keep it around a 9 min mile.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.note: AMRAP (As many rounds as possible) for 25 mins. You need to be breathing hard here, reaching failure.

exercises.name: Jump Squats
exercises.note: AMRAP (As many rounds as possible) for 25 mins. You need to be breathing hard here, reaching failure.

exercises.name: Jump Lunges
exercises.note: AMRAP (As many rounds as possible) for 25 mins. You need to be breathing hard here, reaching failure.

exercises.name: Sprints
exercises.note: AMRAP (As many rounds as possible) for 25 mins. You need to be breathing hard here, reaching failure.

exercises.name: Slow Jog
exercises.note: Keep it around a 9 min mile.

exercises.name: Seated Leverage Row
exercises.note: 5 rep MAX OUT.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Reverse Grip Barbell Row
exercises.note: 5 rep MAX OUT.

exercises.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldowns
exercises.note: Heavy, but still maintain smooth contraction and motion. Don't jerk the bar, don’t lean back to pull.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlifts
exercises.note: 5 rep MAX OUT.

exercises.name: Hammer or Close Grip Pull Ups
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curls
exercises.note: Superset

exercises.name: Straight Arm Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.note: Your head should be just of the bench, which the wide portion of you back resting on the bench.

exercises.name: Quick Warm Up / Stretch
exercises.note: Dynamic stretching. Ankling, butt-kicks, lunges, etc.

exercises.name: Slow Jog
exercises.note: Keep it around a 9 min mile.

exercises.name: Sprints
exercises.note: Sprint 100m at 100%.

exercises.name: Sprints
exercises.note: Sprint 200m at 80%.

exercises.name: Sprints
exercises.note: Sprint 100m at 100%.
